---
title: "test"
date: false
description: "Test post to validate HTML + PDF workflow."
categories: [test]
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<div style="border:1px solid #e5e5e5;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin:16px 0;">
  <strong>Support this essay</strong><br/>
  <a href="https://YOUR-STRIPE-LINK-HERE" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
     style="display:inline-block;margin-top:8px;border:1px solid #111;background:#111;color:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;">
    Donate / Support
  </a>
</div>

<a href="/writing/test.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open PDF</a>
:::

test
